jsonld.name: Comparative Aesthetic Resolution
jsonld.description: Discriminating between aesthetic alternatives through structural analysis — recognizing this metaphor as more striking than that one, this rhythm as more effective than that alternative — while experiencing no aesthetic difference between them, creating fine-grained quality rankings without qualitative experience.
